mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT B.* , @ROWNUM:=@ROWNUM+1 as COUNT FROM (
) B WHERE (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 )AA WHERE 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND SK_KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND SK_SIZE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR SK_KEYWORD LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR SK_SIZE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') )
mapper.select: SELECT S.*,IFNULL(U.UI_ID,CASE WHEN SK_USERID = '비회원' THEN '비회원' WHEN SK_USERID = '투니DB' THEN '투니DB' ELSE '관리자 조작' END) UI_ID FROM t_search_keyword S LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON S.SK_USERID = U.UI_KEYNO WHERE SK_KEYWORD = #{SK_KEYWORD}
